original: This bulky variant of the ‘slut ray’ was designed for power rather than concealment. Instead of being used for covert brainwashing, it is intended for use in less-than-lethal combat, though the strength of its effects make it equally well-suited to the former. When fired, brilliant pink beams of psychicly-attuned energy fly through the air. Victims of this weapon report experiencing vivid sexual fantasies, often of the wielder, that linger for many hours after exposure.
